ops.title: Backport osascript quoting fix to cc-review channelsetup
ops.description:
cc-orchestrate's P4 review confirmed a root command-injection vector in the ported `channelsetup.ApplyManagedViaAdmin` pattern: the staging file from `os.CreateTemp("", …)` resolves against the environment-controlled `TMPDIR`, and that path was interpolated unescaped into the single-quoted shell command run via `osascript 'do shell script … with administrator privileges'` — a `TMPDIR` containing a quote breaks out into the admin-approved root shell.

cc-orchestrate's fix (channelsetup/channelsetup.go `adminScript`): POSIX-shell-quote every interpolated path (`backend.ShellQuote`-style `'…'\''…'` quoting), then escape the whole command for the AppleScript double-quoted string literal (`\` → `\\`, `"` → `\"`). Golden test: `TestAdminScriptQuoting`.

cc-review's `internal/channelsetup/channelsetup.go` is the original source of the pattern and still has the unescaped interpolation — port the same two-layer quoting (and the golden test) there.

ops.text: cc-review's ApplyManagedViaAdmin shell-quotes the staging/dest paths and AppleScript-escapes the composed command
a quoting test covering a hostile TMPDIR-style path passes in cc-review
